playTickSound.Name: playTickSound
playTickSound.Description: Play a tick sound as items scroll?

tickSound.Name: tickSound
tickSound.Description: Sound to play as each slot item scrolls past

showSpinsOwed.Name: showSpinsOwed
showSpinsOwed.Description: Enable to show count of spins remaining

autoShowHide.Name: autoShowHide
autoShowHide.Description: Hide the slot machine while idle. It pops in when a spin starts and pops away after the result

resultDisplaySeconds.Name: resultDisplaySeconds
resultDisplaySeconds.Description: How many seconds the result display stays visible before clearing or hiding
